title: Warren Kremer
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image= |name=Warren Kremer |birth=[[1920s#1921|1921]]
[[Wikipedia:The Bronx|The Bronx]], [[Wikipedia:New York|New York]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.nytimes.com/2003/09/10/arts/warren-kremer-82-who-drew-richie-rich.html|title=Warren Kremer, 82, Who Drew Richie Rich|work=The New York Times|archivedate=20240301185008}} |death=[[July 24]], [[2003]]
[[Wikipedia:Glen Ridge, New Jersey|Glen Ridge, New Jersey]] |listedpronouns= |nationality= |occupation=Illustrator |companies=*[[Wikipedia:Harvey Comics|Harvey Comics]] *[[Marvel Comics]] / [[Star Comics]]{{Marvel|url=comics/creators/10099/warren_kremer|text=Warren Kremer: Comics}} |website= }} '''Warren Kremer''' is an illustrator who has worked as artist/penciller on every issue of the [[Marvel Comics]]/[[Star Comics]] [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] comic book series. He also provided art for many other Star Comics series. Born in [[Wikipedia:The Bronx|The Bronx]], [[Wikipedia:New York|New York]] in [[1920s|1921]], Kremer worked for [[Wikipedia:Harvey Comics|Harvey Comics]] for thirty-five years, during which he co-created the popular character [[Wikipedia:Richie Rich|Richie Rich]] in [[1950s|1953]], and updated the design of [[Wikipedia:Casper the Friendly Ghost|Casper the Friendly Ghost]]. Kremer died at age 82 in [[Wikipedia:Glen Ridge, New Jersey|Glen Ridge, New Jersey]] on [[July 24]]th, [[2003]]. ==Works== ===Bibliography=== *[[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' 1]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Ewoks'' 2]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 3|''Ewoks'' 3]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 4|''Ewoks'' 4]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' 5]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 6|''Ewoks'' 6]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 7|''Ewoks'' 7]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 8|''Ewoks'' 8]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 9|''Ewoks'' 9]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 10|''Ewoks'' 10]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' 11]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 12|''Ewoks'' 12]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 13|''Ewoks'' 13]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 14|''Ewoks'' 14]] *[[Ewoks (1985) 15|''Ewoks'' 15]] {{C|canceled issue}} *[[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' 4]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=images by Warren Kremer}} *[[Marvel Age 19|''Marvel Age'' 19]] *[[Marvel Age 28|''Marvel Age'' 28]] *{{InsiderCite|228|Launchpad}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/creators/10099/warren_kremer|text=Warren Kremer: Comics}} *{{WebCite|url=https://www.geocities.com/mike_beidler/starwarsliteraturecompendium/scrg3ewoks.html|text=The Star Wars Literature Compendium|archivedate=20021015125116}} {{Interlang |es=Warren Kremer }} [[Category:Comic book cover artists]] [[Category:Comic book inkers]] [[Category:Comic book pencillers]]
